Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 43 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Abusing Customizable Selects 54 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 45 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 175 upvotes, 23 comments
  5. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 69 upvotes, 8 comments
  6. TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster 44 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. Autoresearch on an old research idea 310 upvotes, 68 comments
  8. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 67 upvotes, 10 comments
  9. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 135 upvotes, 26 comments
  10. Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem 140 upvotes, 31 comments
  11. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 174 upvotes, 44 comments
  12. Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive 197 upvotes, 57 comments
  13. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 235 upvotes, 78 comments
  14. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 121 upvotes, 36 comments
  15. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 96 upvotes, 29 comments
  16. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 177 upvotes, 63 comments
  17. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 230 upvotes, 90 comments
  18. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 527 upvotes, 249 comments
  19. An incoherent Rust 147 upvotes, 66 comments
  20. Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  21. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 176 upvotes, 96 comments
  22. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 146 upvotes, 93 comments
  23. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 236 upvotes, 163 comments
  24. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 375 upvotes, 285 comments
  25. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 237 upvotes, 258 comments
  26. America tells private firms to “hack back” 126 upvotes, 134 comments
  27. I created my first AI-assisted pull request 60 upvotes, 64 comments
  28. Scott Hanselman says he's working on Windows local accounts 16 upvotes, 12 comments
  29. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 73 upvotes, 92 comments
  30. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 375 upvotes, 585 comments

Last generated 12:30pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
